findings.message: New datastore query path `get_item_by_name` has no metric or span instrumentation. The function executes a database query (session.scalars + select) without any observability — no OpenTelemetry span, no latency metric, and no row-count metric. Datastore access should be instrumented for latency tracking and error correlation.
findings.suggestion: Wrap the query with an OpenTelemetry span (e.g., `with tracer.start_as_current_span('db.item.get_by_name')`) and record query latency/row counts via the MetricsRegistry. Also ensure database errors are logged with correlation_id for debugging.
